name: Mediawiki
tagline: MediaWiki is a collaboration and documentation platform brought to you by a vibrant community.
description:
MediaWiki is a collaboration and documentation platform brought to you by a vibrant community.

Docs: https://www.mediawiki.org?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  mediawiki:
    image: mediawiki:latest
    volumes:
      - mediawiki-images:/var/www/html/images
      - mediawiki-sqlite:/var/www/html/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://localhost:80
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42066:80
volumes:
  mediawiki-images: null
  mediawiki-sqlite: null
